---
title: "https://www.nejm.org/doi/full/10.1056/NEJMcpc2513546"
author: "謝慕揚 MD, PhD, FESC"
date: 2026-01-01
lang: zh-TW
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

{**[Case 6-2026: A 91-Year-Old Man with Shortness of Breath, Weight Loss, and Eosinophilia](https://www.nejm.org/doi/full/10.1056/NEJMcpc2513546)**
[0.5cm]
{**病例 6-2026：一位91歲男性，主訴呼吸困難、體重減輕及嗜酸性球增多**}
[0.3cm]
{N Engl J Med 2026;394:794-805   [DOI: 10.1056/NEJMcpc2513546](https://doi.org/10.1056/NEJMcpc2513546)}
[0.3cm]
{February 19, 2026}


## 病例呈現 (Case Presentation)


### Chief Complaint 主訴

A 91-year-old man presented to the emergency department of this hospital because of **worsening dyspnea on exertion, weight loss, and eosinophilia**.

一位91歲男性因**漸進性運動性呼吸困難、體重減輕及嗜酸性球增多**至Massachusetts General Hospital急診就診。


### History of Present Illness 現病史


importantbox
**Key Timeline 關鍵時間線：**

- **8 months before admission**: Progressive dyspnea on exertion, difficulty walking up hills and stairs; sinus congestion, rhinorrhea, anosmia; AEC 1280/\textmu L. Umeclidinium started.         入院前8個月：漸進性運動性呼吸困難，上坡及爬樓困難；鼻竇充血、流鼻涕、嗅覺喪失；AEC 1280/\textmu L。開始使用umeclidinium。
- **6 months before admission**: Worsening dyspnea and cough; wheezing; CXR: left upper lobe opacity (pneumonia); AEC 1370/\textmu L. Treated with prednisone, azithromycin, amoxicillin--clavulanate.         入院前6個月：呼吸困難及咳嗽加劇；喘鳴音；CXR：左上肺葉混濁（肺炎）；AEC 1370/\textmu L。予prednisone、azithromycin、amoxicillin--clavulanate治療。
- **2 months before admission**: Dyspnea at rest and cough; SpO$_2$ 91         入院前2個月：靜態呼吸困難及咳嗽；SpO$_2$ 91
- **Day 0 (Admission)**: Progressive dyspnea while descending stairs; SpO$_2$ 70         入院當日：下樓時漸進性呼吸困難；行走後SpO$_2$ 70


importantbox


**Clinical Pearl: Waxing and Waning Pulmonary Opacities 波動性肺浸潤**

此病人的CXR在不同時間呈現fluctuating opacities（波動性混濁）：右下肺葉混濁縮小、左下肺葉混濁不變、出現新的bilateral pleural effusions。這種波動性肺浸潤模式提示recurring或persistent process，而非single acute event，是eosinophilic lung disease的特徵性表現。


### Review of Systems 系統回顧


- Weight loss: **15.9 kg in 6 months（6個月內體重減輕15.9公斤）**
- Negative for: hematuria, hemoptysis, pruritus, urticaria, numbness/tingling, weakness, night sweats, rash, anorexia
- 否認：血尿、咳血、搔癢、蕁麻疹、麻木/刺痛、虛弱、夜間盜汗、皮疹、食慾不振


### Past Medical History 過去病史


| p{4cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{11cm}}  **Category    類別** | **Details    詳細內容** |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Past Medical History** | - Benign prostatic hyperplasia    - Paroxysmal atrial fibrillation    - Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD)    - Coronary artery disease (PCI with drug-eluting stent 8 years prior) |  |  |  |  |
| **Medications** | - Warfarin    - Tamsulosin    - Aspirin    - Inhaled fluticasone    - Umeclidinium |  |  |  |  |
| **Social History** | - Lives in Massachusetts, assisted living facility    - Independent in all ADLs and IADLs    - Smoking: 15 pack-years, quit 40 years ago    - No alcohol, no recreational drugs    - No travel since military service in 1950s |  |  |  |  |
| **Allergies** | No known adverse reactions to medications |  |  |  |  |


### Physical Examination 身體檢查


On examination:

- Temperature: 35.6\textdegree C
- Blood pressure: 98/54 mm Hg
- Pulse: 71 beats per minute
- Respiratory rate: 20 breaths per minute
- Oxygen saturation: 93
- Heart: Irregularly irregular rhythm, no murmurs, no JVD
- Lungs: **Diffuse wheezing**; no crackles or diminished breath sounds
- No rash, no palpable organomegaly, no lymphadenopathy


### Laboratory Data 實驗室數據


| p{4.5cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{2.5cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{3cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{4.5cm}}  **Test    檢驗項目** | **Result    結果** | **Reference    參考值** | **Clinical Significance    臨床意義** |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| White-cell count | **37,780/\textmu L** | 4,000--11,000 | Marked leukocytosis    顯著白血球增多 |  |  |
| Absolute eosinophil count | **27,390/\textmu L** | 0--900 | Severe eosinophilia    嚴重嗜酸性球增多 |  |  |
| Neutrophils | 8,080/\textmu L | 1,800--7,700 | Mildly elevated    輕度增高 |  |  |
| Lymphocytes | **570/\textmu L** | 1,000--4,800 | Lymphopenia    淋巴球低下 |  |  |
| Hemoglobin | 12.8 g/dL | 13.5--17.5 | Mild anemia    輕度貧血 |  |  |
| Platelet count | 248,000/\textmu L | 150,000--400,000 | Normal 正常 |  |  |
| NT-proBNP | **4,300 pg/mL** | 0--1,800 | Elevated (cardiac involvement?)    升高（心臟受累？） |  |  |
| High-sensitivity Troponin T | **56 ng/L** | 0--14 | Elevated (myocardial injury)    升高（心肌損傷） |  |  |
| IgG | **3,099 mg/dL** | 614--1,295 | Polyclonal hypergammaglobulinemia    多株高免疫球蛋白血症 |  |  |
| IgE | **266 IU/mL** | 0--100 | Elevated (atopy/EGPA)    升高（過敏/EGPA） |  |  |
| IgA | 196 mg/dL | 69--309 | Normal 正常 |  |  |
| IgM | 203 mg/dL | 53--334 | Normal 正常 |  |  |
| IgE vs. *A. fumigatus* | **2.99 kU/L** | $<$0.10 | Elevated (ABPA?)    升高（ABPA？） |  |  |
| Vitamin B$_{12}$ | 912 pg/mL | $>$231 | Normal (against myeloproliferative HES)    正常（不支持骨髓增殖型HES） |  |  |
| Tryptase | 6.3 ng/mL | $<$11.5 | Normal (against myeloproliferative HES)    正常（不支持骨髓增殖型HES） |  |  |
| LDH | **397 U/L** | 110--210 | Elevated (tissue turnover)    升高（組織代謝增加） |  |  |
| ESR | **49 mm/hr** | 0--19 | Elevated (inflammation)    升高（發炎） |  |  |
| CRP | **28.0 mg/L** | $<$8.0 | Elevated (inflammation)    升高（發炎） |  |  |
| Free kappa light chain | **45.6 mg/L** | 3.3--19.4 | Elevated (polyclonal)    升高（多株） |  |  |
| Free lambda light chain | **36.2 mg/L** | 5.7--26.3 | Elevated (polyclonal)    升高（多株） |  |  |
| Kappa/lambda ratio | 1.26 | 0.30--1.70 | Normal (no monoclonal process)    正常（無單株增殖） |  |  |
| SPEP | Negative | Negative | No monoclonal component    無單株成分 |  |  |
| ANA | Negative | --- | No lupus    排除紅斑性狼瘡 |  |  |
| Stool O | P | Negative | --- | No parasites    無寄生蟲 |  |
| Albumin | 3.6 g/dL | 3.3--5.0 | Normal 正常 |  |  |
| Creatinine | 0.74 mg/dL | 0.60--1.50 | Normal renal function    腎功能正常 |  |  |


### Imaging Studies 影像學檢查


#### Chest Radiograph 胸部X光


- 2 months prior: New bibasilar patchy opacities, more prominent in right lung
- On admission: Decreased size of right lower lobe opacities; unchanged left lower lobe opacities; **new small bilateral pleural effusions**
- Interpretation: Fluctuating opacities suggest a recurrent or persistent process
- 解讀：波動性混濁提示反覆或持續性病程


#### CT Chest, Abdomen, and Pelvis 胸腹部電腦斷層


- **Diffuse bronchial-wall thickening（瀰漫性支氣管壁增厚）**
- **Mucus plugging（黏液栓塞）**
- **Tree-in-bud pattern** in right lower lobe（右下肺葉樹芽狀陰影）
- Small areas of bilateral subsegmental atelectasis（雙側小節段性肺不張）
- Mediastinal subcarinal lymphadenopathy, nodes up to 1.8 cm（縱膈腔隆突下淋巴結腫大，最大1.8 cm）
- Enlarged prostate, bladder calculi（攝護腺肥大、膀胱結石）
- Left hydroureteronephrosis（左側水腎水輸尿管）
- Right renal cortical cyst（右腎皮質囊腫）


#### Peripheral Blood Smear 周邊血液抹片


- Elevated number of **mature eosinophils with bilobed nuclei and vacuolization (suggestive of reactivity)**
- Normal red-cell and platelet morphologic features
- No premature or blast forms
- 成熟嗜酸性球增多，雙葉核及空泡化（提示反應性），無芽細胞


## 醫學英文寫作解析 (Medical English Writing Analysis)


| p{5cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{3cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{4cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{3cm}}  **Original Sentence    原文例句** | **Grammar Structure    文法結構** | **Chinese Translation    中文翻譯** | **Writing Technique    寫作技巧** |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| "The patient had been in his usual state of health...until 8 months before the current admission, when progressive dyspnea on exertion developed." | Past Perfect with "until...when" | 病人在入院前8個月之前維持平常的健康狀態，直到漸進性運動性呼吸困難出現。 | 使用過去完成式建立發病前的健康基準    Establishes baseline before illness onset |  |  |
| "The fluctuating size of the lung opacities, in association with pleural fluid, suggests a recurrent or persistent process rather than a single acute event." | "in association with" + "rather than" | 肺部混濁的波動大小，伴隨肋膜積液，提示反覆或持續性病程，而非單一急性事件。 | 使用介詞片語連結發現，並以"rather than"排除其他可能    Linking findings and excluding alternatives |  |  |
| "Although several features of this patient's case can be used to build a differential diagnosis, the finding of eosinophilia is the most striking." | Concessive clause "Although..." | 雖然此病人的多項特徵可用於建立鑑別診斷，但嗜酸性球增多是最突出的發現。 | 以讓步子句聚焦關鍵發現    Concessive clause to focus on key finding |  |  |
| "It is essential to diagnose or rule out myeloproliferative hypereosinophilic syndrome early in the presentation, since the disorder is highly responsive to receptor tyrosine kinase inhibition with imatinib." | "It is essential to...since..." | 早期診斷或排除骨髓增殖型HES至關重要，因為此疾病對imatinib的受體酪胺酸激酶抑制具高度反應性。 | 使用"It is essential"強調緊迫性，以"since"說明理由    Emphasizes urgency with causal reasoning |  |  |
| "EGPA is unique within the ANCA-associated vasculitis spectrum because it is manifested by both hematologic (eosinophilia) and atopic (allergic airway disease) features before vasculitic features develop." | "is unique...because..." + parenthetical definitions | EGPA在ANCA相關血管炎中是獨特的，因為在血管炎特徵出現前，它同時表現出血液學（嗜酸性球增多）和過敏性（過敏性呼吸道疾病）特徵。 | 使用括號內定義清楚解釋專有名詞    Parenthetical clarification of terms |  |  |
| "Subtle differences that favor a diagnosis of EGPA in this patient include signs of extrapulmonary involvement, such as elevated levels of troponin T and NT-proBNP, and prominent upper-airway symptoms." | "Subtle differences that favor...include...such as" | 支持此病人EGPA診斷的微妙差異包括肺外受累的跡象，如troponin T和NT-proBNP升高，以及明顯的上呼吸道症狀。 | 以"such as"舉例說明    Uses "such as" for specific examples |  |  |


## 鑑別診斷 (Differential Diagnosis)


**Dr. Pavan K. Bendapudi的診斷思路**

面對此91歲男性的嗜酸性球增多，採用modified Klion classification system進行系統性鑑別：

1. 首先排除所有secondary (nonhematologic) causes
2. 再分類至五大primary hypereosinophilic syndrome類型
3. 利用IgE、tryptase、vitamin B$_{12$水平協助區分


}


### 嗜酸性球增多的次級原因 (Secondary Causes of Eosinophilia)


| p{3.5cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{4cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{4cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{3.5cm}}  **Differential Diagnosis    鑑別診斷** | **Supporting Evidence    支持證據** | **Against    不支持證據** | **Suggested Workup    建議檢查** |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Secondary Causes 次級原因** |  |  |  |  |  |
| **Cancer    惡性腫瘤** | - 體重減輕15.9 kg    - 高齡 | - **影像學無佔位性病變**    - 無其他malignancy evidence | CT chest/abdomen    Bone marrow biopsy |  |  |
| **Allergic Reactions    過敏反應** | - Wheezing    - Elevated IgE | - 無新藥物暴露    - AEC遠高於典型過敏反應    - 嗜酸性球增多程度過高 | Drug history review    Specific IgE panels |  |  |
| **Adrenal Insufficiency    腎上腺功能不足** | - 體重減輕    - 低血壓 (98/54) | - 無其他adrenal insufficiency表現    - 電解質正常 | Morning cortisol    ACTH stimulation test |  |  |
| **Connective-Tissue    Disorders    結締組織疾病** | - 多系統症狀 | - ANA negative    - 無關節炎、皮疹 | ANCA    Complement levels |  |  |
| **Parasitic Infection    (Strongyloidiasis)    寄生蟲感染** | - Eosinophilia | - 無epidemiologic risk factors    - 1950年代後未出國    - Stool O | P negative | Strongyloides IgG    Stool examination |  |
| **Primary Causes 原發原因 (Hypereosinophilic Syndromes)** |  |  |  |  |  |
| **Myeloproliferative HES    骨髓增殖型HES**    (FIP1L1--PDGFRA fusion) | - 男性（好發男性）    - Marked eosinophilia    - 高齡 | - **Vitamin B$_{12**$ normal (912 pg/mL)}    - **Tryptase normal (6.3 ng/mL)**    - 正常B12和tryptase對此診斷高度敏感，使之不太可能 | FISH for FIP1L1--PDGFRA    Karyotype    Flow cytometry |  |  |
| **Lymphocytic HES    淋巴球型HES**    (Clonal T-cell driven) | - Elevated IgE (IL-5 driven)    - Severe eosinophilia | - **無皮膚表現**      (pruritus, urticaria, eczema)    - 約80 | Flow cytometry    (CD3$^-$CD4$^+$ T cells)    T-cell clonality |  |  |
| **Chronic Eosinophilic    Pneumonia    慢性嗜酸性球肺炎** | - Waxing/waning pulmonary opacities    - Eosinophilia    - Wheezing | - 有肺外症狀      (elevated troponin T, NT-proBNP)    - 上呼吸道症狀明顯 | BAL with cell count    Lung biopsy |  |  |
| **Allergic Bronchopulmonary    Aspergillosis (ABPA)    過敏性支氣管肺麴菌病** | - **IgE vs. A. fumigatus elevated (2.99 kU/L)**    - Wheezing    - Mucus plugging on CT | - 無long-standing eosinophilic asthma    - 無overt bronchiectasis    - AEC過高 | Total IgE    Aspergillus precipitins    CT bronchiectasis |  |  |
| **emergency_red**{Eosinophilic    **Granulomatosis with**    **Polyangiitis (EGPA)**}    **嗜酸性肉芽腫性多血管炎** | - **Prodrome: allergic rhinitis, sinusitis, anosmia**    - **Adult-onset asthma-like symptoms**    - **Waxing/waning pulmonary opacities**    - **Elevated IgE**    - **Elevated troponin T and NT-proBNP (cardiac involvement)**    - **Normal B12 and tryptase** | - ANCA negative in $\sim$50  - 無peripheral neuropathy    - 無典型皮膚vasculitis | **ANCA (IIF + ELISA)**    Echocardiography    NCS/EMG    Tissue biopsy |  |  |


importantbox
**Clinical Pearl 臨床要點：區分嗜酸性球增多的原發原因**


- **Vitamin B$_{12**$ and tryptase levels}是區分myeloproliferative HES與其他HES的關鍵。兩者升高對myeloproliferative HES（特別是FIP1L1--PDGFRA fusion）高度敏感。
- **Elevated IgE**提示interleukin-5驅動的疾病過程（lymphocytic HES或EGPA），因IL-5同時刺激eosinophil和IgE production。
- EGPA的三階段病程：(1) Allergic prodrome (rhinitis, sinusitis, asthma)；(2) Eosinophilia with end-organ involvement；(3) Small-vessel vasculitis。


importantbox


## 討論 (Discussion)


### Pathophysiology of EGPA 嗜酸性肉芽腫性多血管炎的病理生理學


EGPA (formerly Churg--Strauss syndrome) is a mixed allergic and vasculitic disorder. Its pathogenesis remains unclear, but overproduction of **interleukin-5** appears to be a crucial mediator.

EGPA（舊稱Churg--Strauss syndrome）是一種混合過敏性和血管炎性疾病。其病理機轉尚不明確，但**interleukin-5**的過度產生似乎是關鍵介質。


- IL-5 promotes eosinophil differentiation, chemotaxis, activation, and survival
- IL-5也刺激IgE production，故約70
- EGPA is classified as an **ANCA-associated vasculitis**, along with granulomatosis with polyangiitis (GPA) and microscopic polyangiitis (MPA)
- 30--40
- EGPA is unique: it manifests with hematologic (eosinophilia) and atopic features **before** vasculitic features develop


### Classic Three-Phase Disease Course EGPA經典三階段病程


| p{3cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{5cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{6.5cm}}  **Phase    階段** | **Features    特徵** | **This Patient    本病人** |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Phase 1**    Allergic Prodrome    過敏先兆期 | - Allergic rhinitis    - Chronic sinusitis    - Adult-onset asthma    - Can persist for years | **\checkmark** Sinus congestion, rhinorrhea, anosmia    **\checkmark** Wheezing (asthma-like)    **\checkmark** Chronic/recurrent respiratory symptoms |  |  |  |
| **Phase 2**    Eosinophilic    嗜酸性球期 | - Peripheral eosinophilia    - End-organ involvement      (lung, heart, GI) | **\checkmark** AEC 27,390/\textmu L    **\checkmark** Waxing/waning pulmonary infiltrates    **\checkmark** Elevated troponin T and NT-proBNP |  |  |  |
| **Phase 3**    Vasculitic    血管炎期 | - Small-vessel vasculitis    - Peripheral neuropathy    - Glomerulonephritis    - Skin vasculitis | Not yet apparent in this patient    尚未出現明顯血管炎表現 |  |  |  |


### ANCA in EGPA ANCA在EGPA中的角色


| p{4cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{3.5cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{3.5cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{3.5cm}}  **ANCA Pattern** | **GPA** | **MPA** | **EGPA** |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| c-ANCA / anti-PR3 | 80--90 | Rare | **$\sim$5 |  |  |
| p-ANCA / anti-MPO | Rare | 60--80 | 30--40 |  |  |
| ANCA negative | 10--20 | 20--40 | $\sim$50 |  |  |
| **Clinical correlation** | Vasculitis predominant | Vasculitis predominant | ANCA(+): vasculitis features    ANCA($-$): allergy/eosinophil features |  |  |


**Diagnostic Surprise: c-ANCA (anti-PR3) in EGPA**

此病人的ANCA結果為c-ANCA pattern，anti-PR3 $>$100 U/mL，這在EGPA中罕見（僅約5


### Clonal Hematopoiesis of Indeterminate Potential (CHIP)


此病人的rapid heme panel檢測到兩個基因突變：

- **ASXL1**: Variant allele fraction (VAF) 32.8
- **TET2**: VAF 17.4


Both mutations are implicated in myelodysplastic syndrome, myeloproliferative disorders, and leukemias. However, given the patient's age (91 years) and clinical picture, these findings indicate **CHIP** rather than a hematologic malignancy. CHIP is common in elderly patients and coexists with the EGPA diagnosis.

兩者皆與MDS、MPN和白血病相關。但考慮到病人年齡（91歲）及臨床表現，這些發現指向CHIP而非血液惡性腫瘤。CHIP在老年人中常見，與EGPA共存。


## 最終診斷 (Final Diagnosis)


# Eosinophilic Granulomatosis with Polyangiitis (EGPA)

0.9\textwidth{

**Eosinophilic Granulomatosis with Polyangiitis (EGPA)**
[0.3cm]
**嗜酸性肉芽腫性多血管炎**
[0.3cm]
with Clonal Hematopoiesis of Indeterminate Potential (CHIP)
合併不確定潛能之克隆性造血
}


## 治療計畫 (Treatment Plan)


### Treatment Strategy 治療策略


importantbox
**EGPA Treatment Principles 治療原則**


1. **Assess for organ- or life-threatening manifestations**（評估器官或危及生命的表現）
2. Without organ-threatening disease: **Glucocorticoids alone** for induction（單獨使用類固醇誘導緩解）
3. With organ-threatening disease: Add **cyclophosphamide or rituximab**（加用cyclophosphamide或rituximab）
4. Maintenance: **Anti--IL-5 therapy** (mepolizumab or benralizumab) to facilitate glucocorticoid tapering（抗IL-5治療以促進類固醇減量）


importantbox


### Pharmacological Treatment 藥物治療


| p{3cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{2cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{2cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{2cm} >{\arraybackslash}p{5cm}}  **Drug    (Generic Name)** | **Dose    劑量** | **Route    途徑** | **Frequency    頻率** | **Indication/Mechanism    適應症/機轉** |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Systemic Glucocorticoids**    (Prednisone) | Variable    (taper) | PO | Daily    (tapering) | Induction therapy: suppress eosinophilia and inflammation. Remission in $>$80  誘導治療：抑制嗜酸性球增多和發炎反應 |  |
| **Benralizumab** | 30 mg | SC | Q4W    (first 3 doses)    then Q8W | Anti--IL-5 receptor \textalpha monoclonal antibody. Targets IL-5R\textalpha on eosinophils, depletes eosinophils via ADCC. Facilitates glucocorticoid tapering.    抗IL-5受體\textalpha單株抗體，透過ADCC清除嗜酸性球 |  |


**Mepolizumab vs. Benralizumab in EGPA**


- **Mepolizumab**: Direct IL-5 antagonist; 300 mg SC Q4W for EGPA (higher than asthma dose of 100 mg)
- **Benralizumab**: Anti--IL-5R\textalpha antibody; depletes eosinophils via antibody-dependent cell-mediated cytotoxicity (ADCC)
- Both have shown efficacy in improving remission, reducing relapse, and reducing glucocorticoid use in relapsing/refractory EGPA
- NEJM 2024 trial (Wechsler et al.) compared benralizumab vs. mepolizumab in EGPA


### Treatment Outcome 治療結果


- Dyspnea decreased substantially within 4 weeks（呼吸困難在4週內明顯改善）
- AEC decreased to **0/\textmu L** at 6 weeks（AEC在6週時降至0）
- At 4 months: AEC 20--30/\textmu L; anti-PR3 antibodies undetectable; ESR and CRP normalized（4個月時：AEC 20--30/\textmu L；anti-PR3抗體消失；ESR和CRP正常化）
- No cardiac involvement（無心臟受累）
- Ongoing slow glucocorticoid taper, goal: discontinuation within 6 months（持續緩慢減量類固醇，目標6個月內停藥）


## 學習重點 (Key Takeaways)


**1. Systematic Approach to Eosinophilia 嗜酸性球增多的系統性評估**

- Eosinophilia (AEC $\geq$1500/\textmu L) requires systematic evaluation
- First rule out secondary causes: cancer, allergy, adrenal insufficiency, connective-tissue disorders, parasitic infections
- Then classify into primary HES subtypes using IgE, tryptase, and vitamin B$_{12$
- 先排除次級原因，再以IgE、tryptase、vitamin B$_{12}$分類至primary HES亞型


}


**2. Vitamin B$_{12**$ and Tryptase as Screening Markers for Myeloproliferative HES

- Elevated vitamin B$_{12}$ ($>$1000 pg/mL) and tryptase ($>$11.5 ng/mL) are **highly sensitive** for myeloproliferative HES
- Normal levels effectively rule out myeloproliferative HES (especially FIP1L1--PDGFRA fusion)
- This distinction is critical because myeloproliferative HES responds to **imatinib**
- 正常的B12和tryptase可有效排除骨髓增殖型HES；此區分至關重要，因其對imatinib高度敏感


}


**3. EGPA: Three-Phase Disease with Distinct Phenotypes**

- Classic prodrome: allergic rhinitis, sinusitis, adult-onset asthma (can persist for years)
- Eosinophilic phase: peripheral eosinophilia with organ involvement
- Vasculitic phase: small-vessel vasculitis
- ANCA-positive patients tend toward vasculitic manifestations; ANCA-negative toward allergic/eosinophilic complications
- ANCA陽性者傾向血管炎表現；ANCA陰性者傾向過敏/嗜酸性球相關併發症


**4. Anti--IL-5 Therapy Revolutionizes EGPA Management**

- Mepolizumab and benralizumab reduce relapse risk and enable glucocorticoid tapering
- Can be initiated concurrently with glucocorticoids for earlier tapering
- IL-5 is the central mediator driving both eosinophil expansion and IgE production in EGPA
- 抗IL-5治療可降低復發風險並促進類固醇減量


**5. CHIP in Elderly Patients 老年人的克隆性造血**

- ASXL1 and TET2 mutations were detected but attributed to CHIP, not malignancy
- CHIP prevalence increases with age and does not necessarily indicate hematologic cancer
- Careful clinical correlation is essential to avoid overdiagnosis
- CHIP盛行率隨年齡增加，需仔細臨床判讀以避免過度診斷


## 自我測驗 (Self-Assessment Quiz)


### 題目 (Questions)


**Question 1.** A 91-year-old man presents with progressive dyspnea, weight loss, and an absolute eosinophil count of 27,390/\textmu L. Which of the following is the most appropriate first step in evaluation?

一位91歲男性出現漸進性呼吸困難、體重減輕及絕對嗜酸性球計數27,390/\textmu L。下列何者是最適當的第一步評估？


1. Bone marrow biopsy
2. Start empiric imatinib
3. Rule out secondary (nonhematologic) causes of eosinophilia
4. Flow cytometry for aberrant T-cell clones
5. Start high-dose glucocorticoids immediately


**Question 2.** Which combination of laboratory findings is most sensitive for identifying myeloproliferative hypereosinophilic syndrome (particularly FIP1L1--PDGFRA fusion)?

下列哪種實驗室檢查組合對識別骨髓增殖型HES（特別是FIP1L1--PDGFRA fusion）最為敏感？


1. Elevated IgE and elevated ESR
2. Elevated vitamin B$_{12}$ and elevated tryptase
3. Elevated LDH and elevated CRP
4. Elevated IgG and elevated free light chains
5. Elevated NT-proBNP and elevated troponin T


**Question 3.** This patient has normal vitamin B$_{12}$ and tryptase levels with elevated IgE. Which hypereosinophilic syndrome subtype does this laboratory profile best support?

此病人具有正常的vitamin B$_{12}$和tryptase水平，IgE升高。這種實驗室組合最支持哪種HES亞型？


1. Myeloproliferative hypereosinophilic syndrome
2. Familial hypereosinophilic syndrome
3. Idiopathic hypereosinophilic syndrome
4. Lymphocytic HES or overlap HES (including EGPA)
5. Chronic eosinophilic leukemia


**Question 4.** Which of the following clinical features best distinguishes EGPA from lymphocytic hypereosinophilic syndrome?

下列何項臨床特徵最能區分EGPA與淋巴球型HES？


1. Elevated IgE level
2. Peripheral eosinophilia
3. Prominent cutaneous manifestations (pruritus, urticaria, eczema)
4. Upper-airway symptoms (rhinitis, sinusitis, anosmia) with asthma
5. Response to anti--IL-5 therapy


**Question 5.** Regarding ANCA in EGPA, which of the following statements is correct?

關於ANCA在EGPA中的角色，下列何者正確？


1. All patients with EGPA are ANCA-positive
2. The most common pattern is c-ANCA (anti-PR3)
3. Approximately 50
4. ANCA-negative patients tend to have more vasculitic manifestations
5. ANCA testing is not useful in EGPA


**Question 6.** This patient's IgE level against *Aspergillus fumigatus* was elevated at 2.99 kU/L. What is the clinical significance of this finding in the context of EGPA?

此病人對*Aspergillus fumigatus*的IgE為2.99 kU/L（升高）。在EGPA的背景下，此發現有何臨床意義？


1. It rules out EGPA and confirms allergic bronchopulmonary aspergillosis (ABPA)
2. Chronic ABPA has been hypothesized to trigger EGPA in some persons
3. It indicates active pulmonary aspergillosis requiring antifungal therapy
4. It is an expected finding in all patients with eosinophilia
5. It is a false-positive result with no clinical significance


**Question 7.** The classic three-phase disease course of EGPA includes all of the following EXCEPT:

EGPA的經典三階段病程包括以下所有，**除了**：


1. Allergic prodrome (rhinitis, sinusitis, asthma)
2. Eosinophilia with end-organ involvement
3. Small-vessel vasculitis
4. Myeloproliferative transformation
5. Adult-onset asthma that can persist for years


**Question 8.** A patient with newly diagnosed EGPA without organ- or life-threatening manifestations should receive which initial treatment?

新診斷EGPA但無器官或危及生命表現的病人，應接受何種初始治療？


1. Imatinib
2. Cyclophosphamide
3. Systemic glucocorticoids alone
4. Rituximab
5. Plasma exchange


**Question 9.** Regarding benralizumab in EGPA management, which of the following is correct?

關於benralizumab在EGPA治療中的角色，下列何者正確？


1. It is a direct IL-5 antagonist
2. It targets IL-5 receptor \textalpha and depletes eosinophils via antibody-dependent cell-mediated cytotoxicity
3. It is only indicated for myeloproliferative HES
4. It replaces glucocorticoids as first-line monotherapy
5. It has no effect on glucocorticoid tapering


**Question 10.** This patient's DNA-based rapid heme panel detected ASXL1 (VAF 32.8

此病人的rapid heme panel檢測到ASXL1（VAF 32.8


1. Myelodysplastic syndrome
2. Acute myeloid leukemia
3. Chronic eosinophilic leukemia
4. Clonal hematopoiesis of indeterminate potential (CHIP)
5. Myeloproliferative hypereosinophilic syndrome


---


### 答案與解析 (Answers and Explanations)


**Question 1. Answer: (C)**

**Explanation**: The first step in evaluating a patient with eosinophilia is to rule out all secondary (nonhematologic) causes, including cancer, allergy, adrenal insufficiency, connective-tissue disorders, and parasitic infections. Only after secondary causes are excluded should primary hypereosinophilic syndrome subtypes be considered.

**解析**：評估嗜酸性球增多的第一步是排除所有次級（非血液學）原因，包括惡性腫瘤、過敏、腎上腺功能不足、結締組織疾病和寄生蟲感染。只有在排除次級原因後，才考慮原發性HES亞型。


**Question 2. Answer: (B)**

**Explanation**: Elevated blood levels of vitamin B$_{12}$ ($>$1000 pg/mL) and tryptase ($>$11.5 ng/mL) are highly sensitive for myeloproliferative hypereosinophilic syndrome, particularly in patients with FIP1L1--PDGFRA or KIT fusions. Tryptase elevation occurs when the fusion drives expansion of both mast-cell and eosinophil lineages from a common clonal precursor.

**解析**：Vitamin B$_{12}$升高（$>$1000 pg/mL）和tryptase升高（$>$11.5 ng/mL）對骨髓增殖型HES高度敏感。Tryptase升高是因為FIP1L1--PDGFRA fusion存在於同時驅動肥大細胞和嗜酸性球增殖的共同克隆前驅細胞中。


**Question 3. Answer: (D)**

**Explanation**: Normal vitamin B$_{12}$ and tryptase levels effectively rule out myeloproliferative HES. Elevated IgE suggests IL-5--driven eosinophilia, which is characteristic of both lymphocytic HES (where aberrant T cells produce IL-5) and overlap HES including EGPA. Approximately 70

**解析**：正常的vitamin B$_{12}$和tryptase可排除骨髓增殖型HES。IgE升高提示IL-5驅動的嗜酸性球增多，這是lymphocytic HES和overlap HES（包括EGPA）的特徵。IL-5同時刺激嗜酸性球和IgE的產生。


**Question 4. Answer: (D)**

**Explanation**: While both EGPA and lymphocytic HES can cause eosinophilia with elevated IgE and respond to anti--IL-5 therapy, EGPA is characterized by a **prodrome of allergic rhinitis, chronic sinusitis, and adult-onset asthma**. Lymphocytic HES is strongly associated with cutaneous manifestations (pruritus, urticaria, eczema) in approximately 80

**解析**：EGPA的特徵是過敏性鼻炎、慢性鼻竇炎和成人發病型氣喘的前驅期。淋巴球型HES約80


**Question 5. Answer: (C)**

**Explanation**: Approximately 50

**解析**：約50


**Question 6. Answer: (B)**

**Explanation**: Cases of EGPA associated with allergic bronchopulmonary aspergillosis (ABPA) have been reported. Chronic ABPA has been hypothesized to trigger EGPA in some persons, though this patient did not meet full ABPA criteria (no long-standing eosinophilic asthma or overt bronchiectasis). The elevated IgE against *A. fumigatus* may have clinical significance in the context of EGPA pathogenesis.

**解析**：有EGPA合併ABPA的病例報告。慢性ABPA被假設可在某些人中觸發EGPA。此病人雖不完全符合ABPA標準，但此IgE升高在EGPA致病機轉的背景下可能有臨床意義。


**Question 7. Answer: (D)**

**Explanation**: The classic three-phase course of EGPA includes: (1) allergic prodrome with rhinitis, sinusitis, and adult-onset asthma; (2) eosinophilia with end-organ involvement; and (3) small-vessel vasculitis. EGPA is not associated with myeloproliferative transformation. However, lymphocytic HES carries a substantial risk of malignant transformation to T-cell lymphoma.

**解析**：EGPA的經典三階段包括：(1)過敏先兆期；(2)嗜酸性球增多伴器官受累；(3)小血管血管炎。EGPA不伴有骨髓增殖轉化。相反地，淋巴球型HES有轉化為T細胞淋巴瘤的風險。


**Question 8. Answer: (C)**

**Explanation**: The goals of induction therapy for EGPA are to reduce symptoms, prevent organ injury, and lower eosinophil counts. Systemic glucocorticoids alone lead to remission in more than 80

**解析**：對於無器官或危及生命表現的EGPA，單獨使用systemic glucocorticoids可使超過80


**Question 9. Answer: (B)**

**Explanation**: Benralizumab targets the IL-5 receptor \textalpha on eosinophils and depletes them via antibody-dependent cell-mediated cytotoxicity (ADCC). Mepolizumab is the direct IL-5 antagonist. Both have been shown to improve remission, reduce relapse risk, and reduce glucocorticoid use in relapsing or refractory EGPA, and can be initiated concurrently with glucocorticoids to facilitate earlier tapering.

**解析**：Benralizumab靶向嗜酸性球上的IL-5受體\textalpha，透過ADCC清除嗜酸性球。Mepolizumab才是直接的IL-5拮抗劑。兩者均可改善緩解率、降低復發風險和減少類固醇用量。


**Question 10. Answer: (D)**

**Explanation**: ASXL1 and TET2 mutations are implicated in myelodysplastic syndrome, myeloproliferative disorders, and leukemias. However, given the patient's advanced age (91 years) and clinical picture consistent with EGPA rather than a primary hematologic malignancy, these findings indicate clonal hematopoiesis of indeterminate potential (CHIP). CHIP is increasingly common with advancing age and coexists with the EGPA diagnosis without implying malignant transformation.

**解析**：ASXL1和TET2突變與MDS、MPN和白血病相關。但考慮到病人高齡（91歲）及臨床表現一致EGPA而非原發血液惡性腫瘤，這些發現指向CHIP。CHIP盛行率隨年齡增加，可與EGPA共存。

\vfill

*本講義整理自NEJM Case Records of the Massachusetts General Hospital*
*Case 6-2026, N Engl J Med 2026;394:794-805*
[0.3cm]
編輯：謝慕揚 Mu-Yang Hsieh, MD, PhD, FESC
*僅供教學使用，請勿用於商業用途*
